4 | P a g e 
 
 
 
 
 
MATALIKILO 
Kutalika kwiiya kubelesya ncotwaamba mucikuwa kuti ‘Competence Based Curriculum’ caleta 
kwiiya kucincide kwaluzyibo lwakucita zyiyandika kupa kuli basicikolo kubelesya zyakucita 
zyiyandika mazuba aciindi cino kwiiya nikwaunka mujulu, calo citondezya ntaamu yakucinca 
mukusumpula lwiiyo mucisi.  
Bbuku lyakubelesya kuyiisya Mulaka wa Chitonga (Teaching Module) kuli basicikolo bali mu 
Foomu 1 muciiyo ca Mulaka, lyakalembwa kutobela muzeezo wa Competence Based 
Curriculum, walo uswaanganya lwiiyo olu azyintu zyicitika mubuumi bwini bwamuntu.  Zyintu 
zyeelede kucitwa (General Competences) zyakabikkwa mubbuku lijisi zyalwiiyo mucisi lya 
2023 Curriculum Framework zyili swaanganinzyidwe abbuku eeli.  
Eeli bbuku lilaa muzeezo wakugwasyilizya bamayi bayiisya basicikolo ba Foomu 1 mukuyiisya 
kubelesya Competence Based Curriculum, muciindi mabbuku aayelede kubelesyegwa naatana 
lembwa.  Eeci citondezya kulyaaba kuliko kuzwa kumutabi walwiiyo kutegwa caba cintu 
cuubauba kuli bamayi kuyiisya basicikolo.  Nokuba boobo bamayi balakulwaizyigwa 
kuzuzikizya bbuku eeli lyakubelesya kuyiisya kwiinda mubuvwuntauzi bwabo beni kutegwa 
bazuzikizye myaako iinga yajanika ciindi cakuyiisya.  
    
Kelvin Mambwe (Dr)  
Permanent Secretary – Educational Services

5 | P a g e 
 
  
 
KULUMBA  
Lwiiyo lwakutaanguna lwakwiiya Mulaka wa Chitonga mu Foomu 1 nkuzwidilila 
kwakubuzyanya-buzyanya abasikutola lubazu banji mumutabi akunze aamutabi uulanganya 
lwiiyo mucisi.  
Bantu banji, zyikolo ambunga zyinji zyakabuzyigwa kutegwa zyaambe mbozyiyeeya kujatikizya 
kwiiya Mulaka wa Chitonga kwiinda mukwiiya kwakucita zyintu naa Competence Based 
Curriculum.  Mutabi uulanganya lwiiyo uyanda kupa kulumba kuli baabo boonse bakotola 
lubazu kupa twaambo twalo twakagwasyilizya kutegwa bbuku eeli lyakubelesya kuyiisya ba 
Foomu 1 lilembwe.  
Kumamanino ndiyanda kulumba mbunga yababelesi babeleka ku Curriculum Development 
Centre, balo bunkutwe bwabo bwakabelesyegwa bweelede kubona masimpe kuti kulemba bbuku 
eeli kwamaninzyigwa bweelede.  
  
  
Charles K. Ndakala (Dr).  
Director Curriculum Development  
MINISTRY OF EDUCATION

9 | P a g e 
 
 
 
NTALISYO 
Bbuku lyakubelesya kugwasyilizya bamayi kuyiisya mu Foomu 1(Teaching module) 
lyakalembwa kugwasyilizya bamayi kuyiisya bweelede ciiyo ca Mulaka wa Chitonga kubelesya 
nzila yakuyiisya mpya.  
Bbuku   eeli lyakalembwa kutobelezya kuzuminanwa kwakacitika kwakubelesya kucita zyintu 
naa Competence Based Syllabus.  Muzeezo ngwakusola kubaa cakubelesya kuyiisya muciindi 
nokutana lembwa mabbuku aakubelesya akupa basikuyiisya zyakubelesya zyini, zyakucita 
alimwi akulingula kutobelezya basicikolo mpobateene alimwi anzyobayanda.  
Mutabi uulanganya lwiiyo mucisi ulizyi buyumu-yumu buboola kwiinda mukucinca nzila 
yalwiiyo kuya kuli imbi, yalo eeyi njakucikonzya kucita zyintu naa Competence Based mu 
Chikuwa.  Kusala nzila yakucizyiba kucita zyintu naa Competence Based Curriculum (CBC) 
nintaamu mpati yakucinca kusumpula lwiiyo luyandika.  Eeli bbuku litondezya kulyaaba kuliko 
kuzwa kumutabi uulanganya zyalwiiyo kutegwa cibe cintu cuubauba kuli bamayi, kutegwa 
bapegwe malailile, zyakucita zyiyeeyelwa, akulingula basicikolo kweendelanya amizeezo ya 
CBC. Nokuba boobo, bamayi balakulwaizyigwa kuzuzikizya bbuku eeli kwiinda 
mubuvwuntauzi bwabo beni kutegwa bazuzikizye myaako iinga yajanika ciindi cakuyiisya.  
Zyakucita zyapegwa akulingula kwapegwa mubbuku eeli zyiyandika kupa zyakucita zyini 
aluzyibo lwakuyeeyesya kuli basicikolo kumwi kacibapa kulimvwa bupati akucikonzya kucinca 
kutobela zyintu zyipya zyijatikizya kwiiya kucikolo.  Bamayi balakulwaizyigwa kubelesya 
lugwasyo lupegwa, kutobelezya zyintu nzyobacita mumakkilasi aabo, kutegwa kabakonzya 
kubelesya nzila zyimbi, zyizuminika kuti kwayandika.  Ooku kucikonzya kucincauzya boobu 
ncitu cipati kukucita kuti basicikolo boonse, kufwumbwa nkobabede, batambule bubotu kuzwa 
kulwiiyo lubelesyegwa.  
Kuyeeyelwa kuti bbuku eeli ciyakuba cibelesyo cipati kuli bamayi ciindi nobabelesya zyakucita 
zyeelede naa Competence Based Curriculum, kusumpula kucikonzya kupa lwiiyo lweelede, 
luzyibo akubikkila maanu ayandika kusola kuleta nzila yalwiiyo iisumpukide  
BBUKU EELI MBOLYEELEDE KUBELESYEGWA  
Eeli bbuku lyakubelesya kuyiisya (Teaching Module) lijisi zyakuyiisya zyeelede kuyiisyigwa 
kuli ba Foomu 1 muteemu 3.  Lilibikkidwe muzyibeela eezyi: Kuswiilila akukanana, kubala, 
mabala, kumvwisisisya kubala akulemba.  Zyakwiiya zyili mubbuku eeli tazyili zyiiyo, pele 
inga zyabelesyegwa kubamba zyiiyo. Ciindi cakulemba zyiiyo, inga mwabelesya zyakwiiya 
kuzwa muzyibeela zyiindene-indene kulemba ciiyo comwe.  Mukozyanyo: Muciiyo comwe 
inga kwajanika kuswiilila akukanana, mabala, kubala akulemba. Nolemba ciiyo, weelede kusala

10 | P a g e 
 
tubeela twakuyiisya ntoyelede kubikkila maanu kuyiisya, azyakucita zyeelede kucita basicikolo 
kuceelede kucita (Specific Competence) acimwi.  Nkokwaamba kuti acimwi ciiyo cilakonzya 
kubaa ceelede kucitwa ciinda kuli comwe.  
Nokuba boobo, weelede kuzyiba cibeela ceelede kupegwa ciindi cinji muciiyo eeco.  
Kuyungizya, zyakucita zyabasicikolo zyipedwe kuli ceelede kucitwa acimwi, tazyeelede 
kumaninzyigwa muciiyo comwe.  Eezyi inga zyacitwa muzyiiyo zyiindene-indene.  
BWAKUYIISYA BULOMBOZYEGWA  
Kuyiisya kweelede kutobela muzeezo mu Chikuwa ngobati, Gradual Release Model (GRM).  
Mwiiyi weelede kucita cakucita, mpoona weelede kucita cakucita eeci abasicikolo, mpoona 
kumamanino, basicikolo beelede kucita cakucita eeci balikke.  Kunze kwaboobo mwiiyi 
weelede kubelesya nzila zyiindene-indene kuyiisya kutegwa wacikonzya kugwasyilizya 
basicikolo baindene-indene.

MUZEEZO 1: ZYEELEKELO ZYACISI 
1. Ntalisyo  
 Buyale 
Cibeela eeci cilanga zyeelekelo zyacisi. Eezyi zyeelekelo zyitondezya basicisi 
mbobeelede kupona akulilanganya lwabo beni abaabo babazingulukide. Zyilagwasyilizya 
kukamantanya bantu, kutondezya nzila zyakulemekana, kusyomeka akutondezya luyando 
kucisi azyilengwaleza. Mubandi uujatikizya zyeelekelo zyacisi ulalangwa kwamana 
boobo kulalangwa mabala ncaamba. Mulaso uuzubulula muntu mbwalibonya naa bantu 
mbobalibonya ulabandikwa. Kunze kwaboobo, eeci ciiyo cilalanga tukumbatizyo 
twamabala. 
Mukugaminina, 
tukumbatizyo 
tujanwa 
mucibeela 
eeci 
ntootuya 
twakumatalikilo atwakumamanino abbala. Tusimyo atwalo tulasansaulwa bweelede. 
Mukumaninzya cibeela eeci cilalanganya mbokusandululwa, misyobo yakusandulula 
abubotu bujanwa mukusandulula.    
 Cikwelelezya Kuciiyo: Nguzu zyacisi tazyili buyo mubuvwubi, pele mubuponi 
bwabantu bwabuzuba abuzuba.

15 | P a g e 
 
 
Mwiiyi: 
- 
Pandulwida basicikolo muzeezo wamubandi uujatikizya bulelo wapegwa. 
- 
Sala basicikolo bone aumwi apegwe zyina lili mumubandi kuti babale antoomwe 
mubandi wapegwa. 
- 
Ambila basicikolo kuti banomoone mabala mapati-pati ngobatazyi ncaamba. 
- 
Ambila bana kulemba mabala anomoonwa atupepa mpoonya waapandulule. 
- 
Babikke basicikolo mutubunga kuti babambe mibandi yabo beni. 
- 
Bagwasye basicikolo mulaka ngobeelede kubelesya. 
- 
Ambila basicikolo balembe twaambo cakutobelanya. 
- 
Lailila basicikolo bacita kabotu kuti bagwasye baabo batacita kabotu. 
- 
Ambila basicikolo kuti mibandi ibagwasya kuteelela caambwa alimwi akucikonzya 
kukwabana abantu bweelede. 
 
                                                 BULUMBU BWAKUSYOMEKA 
Hankakila: Obuka buti Chibawe? 
Chibawe: Ndabuka musa. Kwaambwa nzi kumaanda? 
Hankakila: Balapona musa. 
Chibawe: Ndalumba 
Hankakila: Chibawe mulombwana, ndaboola kukulomba kuti tukasye mbeba. Bwandijaya 
busa! 
Chibawe: Waamba kabotu cilombwana. Ndilombozya kuti tukazyisyide kumyuunda yabana 
Malala kayi balo bakatebula kale.  
(Balombwana aaba basika kumyuunda yabana Malala akutalika kusya mbeba) 
Hankakila: Maawe! Jamba lyangu lyaganka abbwe. 
Chibawe: Kosyida ambali musa.  
Hankakili: Ino ndibbwe nzi eeli lilibonya mbuli kuti lizingaidwe mukasani? 
Chibawe: Atulilange kabotu-kabotu. 
Hankakila: Mmali aalubulo! Nguni uukonzya kuzikka mali aali boobu mumunzi muno? 
Chibawe: Ma! Eeci cilagambya musa. Tulacita buti?

16 | P a g e 
 
Hankakila: Atwaatole mali aaya kuli sibbuku Dundu, ulazyiba cakucita angawo.  
Chibawe: Wayeeya kabotu musa, atwaatole cakufwambaana. 
Hankakila: Hodi basibbuku 
Sibbuku Dundu: Mwatambulwa balombwana. Amwaambe camuleta kokuno. 
Chibawe: Twajana mali aaya alubulo kaazingaidwe mukasani ciindi notwali kusya mbeba 
mumyuunda yabana Malala (waatambika mali kuli sibbuku cabulemu). 
Sibbuku Dundu: Ma! Aaya mali akalaanguzu ciindi notwakali kukomena. Mfwulumende 
icaayanda mali aaya alimwi ililibambilide kupa zyuulu zyamali kumuntu ukonzya kwaatola 
kubbanga. Cakusaanguna atuyandaule mukamwini mali aaya.  
Hankakila: Twalumba basibbuku. Mucaale kabotu. 
Sibbuku Dundu: Ndime ndalumba balombwana nkaambo mwatondezya kusyomeka kupati. 
Ndilaambilizya ncomwajana eeci kutegwa ulaaco acibweze. Ndiyakumuzyibya zyoonse 
mbozyiya kuba.  
(Nibwakaca munene Bbwantu wakalibonya kuli sibbuku akwaamba kuti usyi wakafwide 
kaindi nguwakali amali ngobakajana basikusya mbeba) 
Sibbuku Dundu: Ndalumba kundizyibya boobo omunenema, Bbwantu. Ndilayaambila 
mfwulumende kujatikizya mali aaya. Iyookupa zyuulu zyamakkwacha. 
Bbwantu: Ndalumba basibbuku. Kamupona lyoonse. 
(Mfwulumende yakapa munene Bbwantu zyuulu zyamakkwacha kkumi. Bbwantu lwakwe 
wakapa sibbuku cuulu comwe camakkwacha kakuli ba Chibawe a Hankakila bakatambula 
zyuulu zyamakkwacha zyibilo aumwi. Bakasumpuka mubukkale bwabo) 
Bulangizi Bweelede: Mutwe wapegwa kujatikizya twaambo twabuponi wabandikwa 
buyandika.

Mwiiyi: 
- 
Ambila basicikolo kaambo antela kaano kajatikizya cibalo ncobayanda 
kubala. 
- 
Bape mbaakani zyakubala, mbuli kwiingula mibuzyo akufwiinsya 
cibalo. 
- 
Ciindi cakubala, bazuminzye basicikolo kuti balibalile cibalo antela 
baswiilizye umwi sikupozya kubala. 
- 
Imika kubala cibalo mumasena mumwi muli twaambo tupati-pati 
akubabuzya mibuzyo naa kusalazya twaambo, akubakulwaizya 
kwaambaula zyatwaambo ootu 
- 
Babuzye mibuzyo ubone kuti naa balacimvwa ncobabala. 
- 
Bamana kubala baambile kuti bafwiinsye cibalo kwiinda mukwaamba 
twaambo tupati-pati tuzwa mucibalo. 
- 
Babuzye mibuzyo iiyanda bwiinguzi bufwaafwi ayiilya iyanda 
bwiinguzi bulamfwu bwakuyeeyesya. 
- 
Bagwasyilizye kuswaanganya cibalo ncobabala azyicitika mumaumi 
aabo naa zyicitika munyika. 
- 
Ulakonzya kubabuzya mibuzyo muciindi cakwiiya (kutegwa uzyibe 
mpobeendela) naa kubapa cakucita kumamanino aaciiyo. 
Kuyungizya kumaccililanwa alaatala awa, ulakonzya:

cibalo.

Mutwe 3: Kubala Kwakupozya 
Mutwe Musyoonto: Kutabbabbalisya Kubala 
 Ntalisyo: Basicikolo balaiya kubala kwakupozya cakutabbabbalisya. Eeci cilabagwasya 
kukonzya kubala twaambo bweelede kubantu baswiilila. Kunze aboobo, cilabagwasya 
akutobela mulawo weelede ciindi muntu nabala cakupozya. Kubala kwakupozya 
kulagwasyilizya abaabo basicikolo batacizyi kabotu kubala ciindi nobaswiilizya bamwi 
kababala mabala atwaambo tubakatazya kubala lwabo beni. Mukuzyiba kuti amwi 
mabala aindana buyo mbwaabalwa pesi kulemba alikonzyenye, uubala ulagwasilizya 
baswiilizya kuzyiba caambwa kwiinda mukwaamba kabotu mabala, mbuli bbala ‘Mala’. 
Uubala weelede kutondezya kwiinda mbuli mbwagusya jwi ncaamba.

KULEMBA  
Mutwe: Mulaso 
Mutwe Musyoonto: Kulemba kwakupandulula  
 Ntalisyo: Mulaso wakupandulula musyobo wakulemba uubelesya mizeezo yakuba 
amanjezyeezya akupandulula muntu, busena nociba cintu. Mukupandulula cintu 
kubelesyegwa mabandausyo kutegwa cintu cipandululwa caba mumizeezo yamuntu 
ubala antela waambilwa.  
 Ceelede Kucitwa: Lemba mulaso uupandulula muntu. 
      Cakucita 1: Kubandika bube azyilanganyizyigwa mukulemba mulaso wakupandulula 
muntu. 
Mwiiyi: 
- 
Ambila basicikolo kuti mulaso oyu weelede kuti kaujisi zyibeela zyipati –pati zyotatwe. 
- 
Buzya basicikolo zyibeela eezyi. (Bwiinguzi bweelede: Ntalisyo. Mubili uulembedwe 
muzyibeela amamanino.) 
- 
Batondezye zyeelede kulembwa amumwi mucibeela kwiinda mukubuzya mibuzyo. 
- 
Batondezye mulaso ngolembede omwini. 
Bube Bwamulaso wakupandulula. 
i. Ntalisyo: Yeelede kujula mizeezo akutondezya mutwe wamakani aatizubululwe 
mumulaso woonse. Eeci cilalembwa mubufwaafwi buyo.

22 | P a g e 
 
ii. Mubili: Kweelede kutondezyegwa twaambo mubulamfwu tupandulula makani aajisi 
mutwe wamulaso oyu. Mulaka weelede kutondezya kabotu kabotu cilembwa cikonzya 
kulizubulula mumizeezo yamuntu ubala. 
Cibeela eeci ceelede kuti kacijisi tumpango totatwe naanka tone tujisi mizeezo 
yaandeene pele mumona mumuzeezo mupati uupandululwa. 
iii. Mamanino: Ajisi muzeezo wamulaso oonse mubufwaafwi. 
    
 
Zyilanganyizyigwa mukulemba mulaso wakupandulula:  
i. 
Belesya mabala akonzya kupandulula cintu cilibonya, cimvwika mbuli 
kununkizya, kumvwa mukuswiilila mumatwi nokuba mukanwa antela acikanda. 
ii. 
Bikka manjezyeeya akuzyiba cintu cipandululwa mumizeezo yamubali kwiinda 
mumabala ngotiibelesye. 
iii. 
Belesya mwaambo wamaambilambali kwaamba kwakubembeleka kubelesya 
tweelanyo naanka kugaminina (kweelanya: ulasiya mbuli mpoto, kutabembeleka: 
waide kuba katambo nkwatalyi kabotu). 
iv. 
Mulaso oyu utondezya uubala kwiinda mumabala ngaabelesya kuzyiba muntu naa 
cintu cipandululwa. 
Bulangizi Bweelede: Bube azyilanganyizyigwa mumulaso wakupandulula zyabandikwa 
buyandika. 
 
      Cakucita 2: Kulemba mulaso wakupandulula (muntu).

-Ambila basicikolo kuti balembe mulaso wakupandulula muntu.

cabbala.

akupandulula 
ncocaamba kukumbatizya amulimo waco. Atala akooku, kulaba kutondezya misyobo

  Cakucita 1: Kupandulula kukumbatizya  ncocaamba amulimo waco. 
Mwiiyi:

23 | P a g e 
 
- 
Talika bupanduluzi bwakukumbatizya kwiinda mukubuzya basicikolo naa balicizyi 
ncocaamba kukumbata. Baambile aumwi akumbate mweenzyinyina.  
- 
Wamana ubatondezye kuti mabala alakonzya kukumbatika kucibeela cimbi cabbala 
citegwa cisiko.  
- 
Tondezya mukozyanyo wacisiko  -ntu calo cikonzya kukumbatika kakumbatizyo 
kumatalikilo mu- kubamba bbala muntu. Kucisiko cabbala amb- ,cilakonzya 
kukumbatikwa –isya kubamba bbala  ambisya. 
- 
Pandulula kuti cisiko cabbala cikumbatikwa ncibeela cabbala citacinci nokuba kuti 
wabikka kakumbatizyo kaindene kakunyina kuzwa mumuzeezo wabbala.  
Mukozyanyo: kucisiko  -ntu , ulakonzya kubamba bbala muntu, bantu, kantu , cibeela 
catacinca  -ntu ngomuyanda wazyina . 
- 
Ambila basicikolo kuti mulimo wakukumbatizya ngwakubamba mabala mapya akucinca 
bbala ncolyaamba. 
- 
Mukuyiisya kukumbatizya, weelede kubabelesya basicikolo kubabuzya mibuzyo, 
bakakilwa nobapandulwida. 
Bulangizi Bweelede: Ncotwaamba ancotubeleka tukumbatizyo twapandululwa buluzi. 
        Cakucita 2: Kujana misyobo yaandeene yatukumbatizyo. 
Mwiiyi: 
- 
Buzya basicikolo misyobo yatukumbatizyo baindauke. 
- 
Baambile basicikolo misyobo yatukumbatizyo akubapandulwida (Twakumatalikilo 
tubikkwa kumatalikilo aabbala, twaakati –kati tubikkwa akati –kati aabbala mpoona 
twakumamanino tujanika kumamanino aabbala.) 
Bulangizi Bweelede: Misyobo yaandeene yatukumbatizyo yajanwa buyandika. 
     Cakucita 3: Kubikka tukumbatizyo kweendelanya amusyobo wato. 
Mwiiyi: 
- 
Lemba mabala ajisi misyobo yatukumbatizyo kubboodi kutegwa basicikolo batondezye 
tukumbatizyo amisyobo yato (mikozyanyo: endesya  -esya nkakumbatizyo 
kakumamanino, ulalemba  - la- nkakumbatizyo kaakati –kati katondezya ciindi, mubotu  
mu-  nkakumbatizyo kakumatalikilo). 
- 
Bikka basicikolo mutubunga akubaambila kuti bajane mabala ambi aajisi tukumbatizyo 
batutondezye amisyobo yato.  
- 
Mwiiminizi wakabunga akamwi azubulule buvwuntauzi bwabo. 
- 
Amuzuminane kubuvwuntauzi bwakabunga akamwi akululamika mpubatacita kabotu. 
Bulangizi Bweelede: Tukumbatizyo twabikkwa mumisyobo yato buluzi. 
       Cakucita 4: Kubamba mabala kubelesya tukumbatizyo. 
Mwiiyi: 
- 
Lemba tukumbatizyo abboodi kutegwa basicikolo babambe mabala 
- 
Bamba bbala kubelesya kamwi katukumbatizyo ntoobapa. 
- 
Baambile kuti kunyina bbala lyeelede kwiindulukwa.

- 
Bacenjezye kuti mabala abelesyegwa kale bataabelesyi pe, babambe aambi mapya.

- 
Bamana kulemba ubweze mabbuku akuya kucconga mulimo aciindi cako. 
Bulangizi Bweelede: Mabala abambwa buluzi kubelesya tukumbatizyo.

zyapegwa akujana zyiindi zyiluzi zyakubelesya tusimyo.

- 
Ambila basicikolo kuti bape tusimyo ntobazyi. 
- 
Lemba kasimyo komwe kubboodi kuzwa kuli ntubapa basicikolo. 
- 
Pandulula ncokaamba ambokabelesyegwa.  
- 
Lemba tusimyo abboodi akulailila basicikolo kuti batupandulule ncotwaamba 
ambotubeleka. 
- 
Sindinganya bwiinguzi bwapegwa abasicikolo. 
Bulangizi Bweelede: Ncotwaamba  ancotubeleka tusimyo cabandikwa buyandika.

Ambila basicikolo kuti kuli tusimyo tucenjezya, tusinsa atwakulumba.

Tondezya mukozyanyo wakasimyo kasinsa (nkwaambila bbwe) akasimyo kayumya –
yumya mbuli (kulala kule amulilo)

Bikka basicikolo mutubunga balembe tusimyo abamwi tobilo tulaya atobilo tusinsa. 
- 
Ambila baiminizi batubunga bazubulule bwiinguzi bwabo, mpoona yebo abasicikolo 
mubandike kubamba muzeezo omwe. 
Bulangizi Bweelede: Tusimyo twabikkwa kweendelana ambotubeleka. 
  
     Cakucita 3: Kutondezya tusimyo tweelede kubelesegwa muziindi zyapegwa.

Belesya mikozyanyo yazyintu zyicitika mubuumi zyobabona basicikolo. 
o Mukozyanyo: kuti koyiisya kasimyo kakuti ‘bbota bweebe’, weelede kwaamba 
cakacitika cimwi ciindi calo ceendelene akasimyo kaambwa aawa. 
- 
Baambile twaano naa tusobano basicikolo twalo tutondezya bupanduluzi bwatusimyo.

- 
Baambile tusimyo tobakonzya kubelesya muminzi yabo.

Weelede kukulwaizya basicikolo kuti kababelesya tusimyo mutwaambo amumibandi.

- 
Ambila basicikolo kuti kuli ciindi ceelede kubelesyegwa kasimyo akasimyo kapedwe. 
- 
Lemba tusimyo wamana waambile basicikolo balembe zyiindi notubelesyegwa. 
Bulangizi Bweelede: Zyiindi zyeelede zyakubelesya tusimyo zyatondezegwa buluzi.

Mubandike abasicikolo bubotu bwakusandulula 
- 
Lemba kaambo kali mu Chikuwa abboodi wamana waambile basicikolo kuti

Weelede kusala twaambo tufwaafwi alimwi tumvwugwa. 
-

Baambile mbuli mabala mbwaaccililana mumisyobo yaambwa.

Usaangune kubapa kaambo katakatazyi akubakulwaizya kuti balange ncokaamba kaambo

Baambile kuti muzyimwi zyiindi mabala amwi amizeezo iimwi yamu Chikuwa tayijisi

- 
Baambile kuti twaandaanyo beelede kutubikka motweelede kabotu –kabotu. 
- 
Bakulwaizye kubelesya mabala aluzi akutasandulula mazyina abantu ccita alikale mu 
Chitonga.

                                    MUNWE OMWE TUUPWAYI NJINA 
Kukkalaamwi mbunyina, mbobakaamba basikale. Ooyu wakaamba wakacibona masimpe 
nkaambo inga waba mbuli muntu nalimbwa mapenzi inga kuli kunyongana. Muntu naamulimba 
mapenzi inga waba mbuli muntu usweekede. Mbabonya basikale alimwi bakati, " Munwe omwe 
taupwayi njina." 
Oobu mbobuumi bwakali kukkala bantu bamumunzi wa Sijembwe. Bakali bantu bakazyi 
kukamantana ncocaamba. Bakali kunga bajata cintu bakali kucicita antoomwe. Mumunzi ooyu 
kwakanyina cikolo. Aboobo bakakkala akuswaangana antoomwe kuti baulange muzeezo oyu 
wakuti bayake cikolo. 
Muzeezo wakazwidilila, bakatalika kubeleka mbuli mulanzyi. Cakali kubotelezya kweebelezya 
mbuli mbobakali kwiimpana kubeleka; bateka meenda, bauma zyitina, bayaka mawondo abajika 
mbabo, peepe ma! Zyitina zyakaumwa biyo nsondo zyobilo nkujana zyalundana. 
Nobakati batalika kuyaka, kwakali kubee bwaanda kuli uubunyamuna masiku. Peepe basa cakali 
kubotelezya. Mbokunga bakali kuyaka buyo makkilasi obile, pe mukulaba kwaliso cakayima 
akwiima cikolo. Bana bamumunzi bakakkomana cakuti bakali kubee batambula Mwami Jesu. 
Buzuba bwakucijalula cikolo eeci kwakali kuzyana , kwakali nyimbo zyisiyene-siyene. Bantu 
bwakabaceda nkuzyana akwiimba. Kwiina wakali kutegwa nguulaaco. Akucijalula cikolo 
bakaita baiminizi babo bamuŋanda yamilawo balo bakaletelezya abalanga lwiiyo mucooko eeci. 
Baiminizi bamuŋanda yamilawo bakakkomana kapatikujana kuti balijisi bantu bankutwe batajisi 
ciindi cakuti balindile mfwulumende kuti ibayakile cikolo. Abalo balangi bazyikilo mbubonya 
cakabamana maanu. Majwi aakulumba akabula, pele bakasyomezya bantu kuti zyuuno 
zyakubelesya abamayi mfwulumende iyakutumina kufwambaana. Eeci cakaleta kukondwa 
kubantu boonse. 
Masimpe mubuumi bwabantu munwe omwe taukonzyi kwiipwaya njina. Ilaide kulokela ansi, 
ndiza ilasweekela mucisani alimwi. Mbotweelede kupona muminzi yesu. 
Bulangizi Bweelede: Zyibalo zyamu Foomu 1 zyabalwa buyandika.

                                                CHEELO A MILUMBE  
Mumunzi mwa Bbubbula kwakali kukkala mikwasyi yobilo yakaindide kupenga. Mikwasyi eeyi 
yakalipengede kapati. Izyakulya nzyobakali kulya mumikwasyi eeyi zyakali zyakulombelela 
ciindi coonse. Mumazuba ngobatakali kupegwa zyakulya, bakalikoona anzala. Bana bacinyonka 
mbabakali kuba acoolwe nkaambo balo bakali kunywa mikupa kuzwa kuli bamanyina. Nokuba 
boobo, abalo kwiina nobakali kukkuta nkaambo kakuti mukupa upangika kwiinda mukulya. 
Imikwasyi eeyi yakalijisi bamaalumi bayeendelezya, pele kwiina nobakali kuyeendelezya 
kabotu. Aaba bamaalumi milimo njobakazyi kapati njakunywa makoko. Bakali kucita kuti 
kufwumbwa mali ngobajana mumilimo njobakali kucita, nkwaanywisya bukoko. Mpoona 
bamakaintu babo bazwa aŋanda kuti bakaakuyandaule milimo, bajoka nkuumwa kubamalumi 
babo. Cintu ncobakali kuuminwa ncakutamikizyigwa buvwuule. Eeci cakapa kuti kubule 
ukonzya kuvwuna mikwasyi eeyi kunzala naa mapenzi aakayijisi. 
Mumikwasyi eeyi yaba Haakanongo a Muunzambede kwakali balombwana bobilo, Cheelo a 
Milumbe. Cheelo wakali mwana waba Haakanongo, mpoona Milumbe, wakali mwana waba 
Muunzambede. Aaba bana, nobakali kuyaa bukomena bakatalika kubona kuti buumi mbobakali 
kupona tiibwakali kabotu pe. Aboobo bakatalika kubuzya bamazyali babo kuti ino nkaambo nzi 
kapati kakapa kuti kabakkala buumi bwamapenzi ciindi coonse. Bwiinguzi mbobakapegwa 
abamazyali babo bwakabanyonganya alimwi bwakalikuusisya kapati. Kwakajanika kuti 
kwakanyina waalikukonzya kuvwuna mikwasyi eeyi akaambo kakunywa makoko alimwi 
abuzuba mbobakajisi bamausyi. 
Buzuba bumwi, Cheelo a Milumbe kabakkede ansi acisamu, kwakainda mulombwana umwi 
wakabbede cizangala cankuku ancinga. Aboobo, balombwana aaba bakamwiimika mulombwana 
ooyu akumubuzya nkwaakazyilide alimwi ankwaakali kugama. Ooyu musankwa, wakabaingula 
balombe aaba kuti, wakazwide kukuula nkuku kumunzi wa Nalucha, alimwi wakali kuya ku 
Chisekese, kukusambala nkuku eezyi. Mpoonya, aaba basankwa bakaandaana.Wakajisi ncinga 
wakaunka mpoona balombwana aba bakacaala kabakkede acisamu aawo.

Lwiiyo ninzi? Nguni wakalweeta? Mukwiingula  balati, “Nkukkala mucikolo kuswiilila bayi 
kababakanana”. Bamwi ategwa, “lwakaboola abamakuwa.’’ Sena ayebo ulazumina kuti lwiiyo 
lwakaboola abamakuwa? 
Bukkale bwesu butondezya kuti lwiiyo lwakaliko mucisi cesu kuzwa lili. Bamayi banji bakaliko, 
bakali kukkala abantu. Izyikolo zyiyakwa zyizyatakaliko. 
Buleza bwakali kuyiisyigwa kwiinda mutusimpi, amukulesya bana kucita zyintu zyitondwa, 
zyalo zyakali kusyomwa kuti zyakali kuleta malweza. Eezyi zyakali mbuli kwaamba kuti ‘Leza 
tacapwi’ akuti ‘Mulema tasekwi’. Kuti waseka mulema inga wanyonoka mulomo. Basimbi abalo 
bakali kulaililwa kuti tibakeelede kuyaana abasankwa kabataninga kwatwa, nkaambo basankwa 
balaumpa. Acalo eeci bakali kucisyoma kapati. 
Atwalo tulawo-lawo twaatebule twakaliko. Twakali kuyiisyigwa kwiinda kukwaambila bana 
zyintu zyitondwa kucita. Ootu tulawo-lawo twakali  mbuli kakuti, kuzubula nyama bapati 
kabatana zubula cilatondwa. Kutaba mulyato kwakali kuyiisyigwa kwiinda mukwaambila bana 
kuti, kucaalizya kulya inga koya kuba mwaamu. Nyama yamusefwu taitengwi, inga koya 
kwiikoola. 
Umwi wansiku wakali kuyandisisya kuyiisya bazyukulu bakwe bukkale bwaansi kwiinda 
muzyaano. Kwakali zyilengwa zyimwi nzyaatakali kuyanda kuti bazyukulu bakwe 
bakaakuzyicite baakukomena. Aboobo bumwi buzuba wakabaanina caano ca Musekalumwi, 
munene wakali kukkala mumunzi mwa Zinywidaamwi. 
Wakatalika kubaanina boobu: Musekelalumwi wakali mulombwana wakakwete mukaintu omwe 
mbubona mbuli bwakali basaanyina mumunzi. Zyimwi zyiindi buumi bwakwe bwakali 
kugambya. Kuti camubuka, wakali kupozomoka kwaambaula kati, “Mebo nseyokelwi kayuni. 
Tandisobaninwi mbuli kuti ninsima yajilo. Nsiyandi uuyinda-yinda aŋanda yangu.’’

56 | P a g e 
 
Kuti wajana mukondo wancinga, zyilamukambila mukaintu, mane aambe kuti wayinda nguni. 
Bana Zinywiidaamwi bakamuzaalikizyide kuti ngu Siguntwi. 
Mukaintu wakwe Musekalumwi wakali mitide kwamyezi fwuka ansondo zyotatwe. Eeci 
cakamuyumizyizye mukanwa mwaalumi ooyu. Bumwi buzuba naakazwa mukuweza, wakajana 
mukaintu wakwe ulaminingana, ulamyongwa, buzuba bwakasika. Kuyoowa kwakwe 
kwakamana, pele komwe, “Nguni uutimutumbusye mukaintu wakwe?” Kayi myaambo yakwe 
yakali zyisinkide nzila zyakali kuzwa kumaanda abantu. Bana Zinywidaamwi bakali kwaamba 
kumbali kuti kwa Musekalumwi kwakazyalide kabwa. Eeci cakapa kuti alubweze lwakabilo-bilo 
kuya kumakwe, bakali kukkala mwasibbuku Mudodolo. Naakasika kumakwe wakabapandulwida 
ncakeendelede. 
Nibakamana  kumvwa kaambo bamakwe akwe, bakatandila kuya kwa Zinywidaamwi. Pesi 
mbwaakazwida buyo Musekalumwi, makani akabija. Mbubakati, ‘Munwe omwe tuupwayi njina, 
simweenda alikke kaamutola kalonga’. Muka Musekelalumwi naakali kumyongwa alikke, 
mwana wakafwa. Nobakabbuka bacembele bakajana kunyina acakali kugwasya. 
Oobu mbwaakabaanina bazyukulu bakwe wansiku, kasola kubayiisya mbokukkalwa abantu. 
Twaano twamusyobo oyu twakali kwaanwa abapati ciindi camasiku. Twakali kusalwa kabotu-
kabotu kutegwa bana bajana cakwiiya. Bantu bakajisi zyilengwa zyibyaabi bakali 
kutondezyegwa mbubakali kusubulwa kwiinda muzyaano. 
Amwalo munyimbo lwiiyo lwaandene lulajanwa. Zyimwi zyiimbo zyijisi mulumbe uukasya 
kucita tuyanza tumwi tubyaabi. Zyimwi zyilatembaula milimo mibotu. Alimwi zyimwi 
zyipandulula bukkale bwakaindi. Kwiinda mukuswiilila majwi anyimbo, kulayiigwa tulengwa 
tubotu twaandeene. 
Imwi nzila njobakali kubelesya bansiku kuyiisya yakali yakuleta bana bakubusyi munsi-munsi 
ambabo ciindi cakubeleka milimo yaandeene. Ciindi banalumi nobakali kuyaka matala, bakali 
kwiita basankwa  bakubusyi kuti babagwasye. Ooku kwakali kucita kuti kumwi kabaiya 
mbokuyakwa matala. 
Ciindi baalumi nobakali kuya kukuvwima, basankwa bakubusyi bakali kuunkilizya. Okuya 
bakali kulangilizya mbobakali kujaya banyama bapati kubelesya nzila zyaandeene. Munzila eeyi 
bakubusyi bakali kwiiya. 
Abalo bana basimbi bakali kwiiya kuli bamanyina abamanyinakulu ciindi cakuluka zyisuwo. 
Basimbi bakali kutumwa kuleta zyintu zyiyandika mbuli; malala, loozi azyimwi. Acalo ciindi 
cakubumba mbubona, basimbi bakali kulangilizya mbozyibumbwa nongo. 
Loonse oolu lwakali lwiiyo kwiinda mukubona. Lwiiyo lwakali kujanwa munzila iili boobu 
tiilwakali kulubwa abakubusyi basimbi abasankwa.

                                     KWAANGWA KWA MALISAWA 
Cimwi ciindi mumwezi wafwuka mumwaka wa 1987, kwakacitika malweza mumunzi 
wa Kalyabulongo alo aakanyandya banamaleya kapati bamanene abamacembele 
batuba kumitwe, bakabona busiku. 
 
Cakali ciindi cacilimo nokupya kapati. Eeci ciindi inga bantu bakamana kale 
kuyobolola zyisyango zyabo akuzyiyobola mumatala, mutubbule alimwi azyisanza. 
Cakaceede nkulikomanisya, kapati nkaambo uli kujulu wakabaceba. Kwakali kucitika 
zyisobano zyaandeene-andeene mbuli nkolola, micado alimwi amapobwe amwi buyo. 
Abaya bakuti bakali kuula zyibelesyo zyipati-pati mbuli matalakita, ncinga azyimwi 
buyo zyintu abalo bakali kupobola. 
 
Ciindi nokupya masyikati, bana bakubusyi abasimpongo bakali kulijana kumulonga 
mukulitontozya mibili yabo kwiinda mukudubbwa mumilonga azyitangazyiba. 
 
Bumwi buzuba bana basankwa kabasamba kumulonga, bamwi bakayungana kufweba 
tulya bayuni. Akati kabana aba kwakali Malisawa, Namundelela, Chijoka alimwi a 
Mujibelo. Aaba bana tombwe mupati wakabakola kapati cakuti bakatalika kuyanda

73 | P a g e 
 
kunyikizya bana basyoonto mumeenda malamfwu, mbuli mbomuzyi zyiba lya Nkala 
mbolili lilamfwu. Aaya makani akabalyatila bapati kumaanda.  Ootu twamusyobo oyu 
teesyi ntwaakali kulya munene wamunzi Hyoongoli. Lubeta lwakaitwa akukkalwa. 
Aaba basankwa bakajaninwa mulandu akulunzyigwa aumwi cuulu camakkwacca. 
 
Sena lyakatanta, bakakacita alimwi kayumya mate. Aaba basankwa bakajatwa kubba 
mpasya kucikolo cina Mauka. Bakabba mabbuku, makkompyuta alimwi azyibelesyo 
zyiyobola mulilo kuzwa kuzuba. Mulandu wakabwezegwa abasilikani baku Choma. 
Nobakabetekwa balombe aaba, bakayubulula maseseke aakanyandya bantu. 
Kwakajanika kuti aaba bana bakatumidwe aamuntu ubeleka mumfwulumende. 
Mulandu kunyina ankowakagama nkaambo kwakabeleka makulo. 
 
Sikale wakati buzuba bwakabi mbumwi naa cito ncozyibide cilumya ntale, Malisawa 
wakakacita kakonkwa bwiimvwi. Bakaunkide kucisobano cankolola ya Mayaba kwa 
Sibululibululi. Nkolola eeyi yakali kulinda. Nobwakamukola bukoko atulya bayuni, 
Malisawa wakalijana mukaanda kamucembele wakali kukkala katungu akazyukulu 
kakwe. Mbwaakakaazanganya kacembele kakunyina akuyoowa bulwazi bwa mpela. 
Wakajatwa akuumwa citaambiki mbuli kuti kuli bajaya nzoka.

kutola muli umwi. Ntaamu zyitobelwa mukusandulula zyilapandululwa. 
Ceelede Kucitwa: Belesya nzila zyaandeene-andene  kusandulula cibalo kuzwa mu Chikuwa 
kutola mu Chitonga, akuzwa mu Chitonga kutola mu Chikuwa. 
    Cakucita: Kusandulula cibalo kuzwa mu Chikuwa kutola mu Chitonga akuzwisya mu 
Chitonga kutola mu Chikuwa kubelesya nzila zyaandeene-andeene (Kubweza muzeezo wacibalo 
oonse, kugusya mabala atayandiki, kubelesya mabala ataliko mucibalo pele ayelela kubelesya, 
akwulanganya kapati muzeezo wacibalo kutali  bube bwamabala). 
Mwiiyi: 
- 
Ambila  basicikolo kuti ciindi notusandulula kuzwa mumulaka umwi kutola mumulaka 
umbi, tuleelede kubona bwini kuti caambwa camvwika kabotu-kabotu kakunyina kucinca 
muzeezo wakaambo. 
- 
Pandulwida basicikolo milawo eeyi: 
 
i. 
Tabeelede kusandulula bbala abbala nobasandulula cibalo. 
ii. 
Muzeezo wacibalo taucinci 
iii. 
Twaandaanyo tweenda antoomwe amulaka, nkokuti atwalo tweelede kubikkwa 
mpotweelede. 
iv. 
Mazyina acigaminina taacincigwi. 
v. 
Taceelede kuleta twaambo tutako mucibalo camulaka uusandululwa. 
vi. 
Ciindi cibelesedwe mumulaka usandululwa tacicinci. 
vii. 
Mabala atajisi mazyina mu Chitonga alazumina kwaalemba mbweena, nkuti buyo 
ayeelede kulembwa mu Chitonga-tonga mbuli; Kkompyuta, Tebule, deleensi, kkabati.

Kuti wajana bbala lipati ndyatazi ncolyaamba, weelede kulisandulula kweendelana
